description: Multi-account Gmail MCP server — read, search, draft, and label across every inbox.
name: io.github.cunicopia-dev/multi-account-gmail-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Path to the Google OAuth "Desktop app" client-secret JSON. Defaults to ~/.gmail-mcp/client_secret.json.
environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_MCP_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Path to the SQLite token store holding per-account refresh tokens. Defaults to ~/.gmail-mcp/tokens.db.
environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_MCP_DB

environmentVariables.description: Localhost port for the OAuth redirect during account authorization. Defaults to 8765.
environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_MCP_OAUTH_PORT

title: Multi-Account Gmail
